name: keep-awake
description: Keeps your computer awake while Claude Code is working, and releases when the turn ends. Scoped per session, so it is safe with multiple Claude windows open. Cross-platform (Windows, WSL2, macOS, Linux) via a Node dispatcher; requires Node.js on PATH.

keep_display_on.title: Keep the display on too
keep_display_on.description: Also keep the monitor lit while Claude works, not just the system awake. Does NOT prevent the lock screen. Default: off (the screen may still dim/turn off).

max_lifetime_hours.title: Max keep-awake hours (safety backstop)
max_lifetime_hours.description: Hard ceiling after which a worker self-releases, in case a session crashes without cleaning up. No normal turn approaches this. Range 1-24.
